compressed_view: Screen-prefix naming convention: every screen-scoped analytics event uses {screen}_ prefix (home_, training_, nutrition_, stats_, settings_, onboarding_, auth_). Cross-screen lifecycle events stay unprefixed (app_open, session_start, sign_in, sign_up). GA4 recommended events keep dictated names (tutorial_begin, login, share). Event template per screen: {screen}_action_tap, {screen}_metric_viewed, {screen}_empty_state_shown, {screen}_error_shown plus screen-specific actions. Test pattern: 1-3 tests per event targeting 1.3-2.7x density. Anti-patterns: ad hoc naming without prefix (pre-Training inconsistency), over-testing at 5.25 tests/event (Home v2 learning cost). Established 2026-04-08, enforced by PRD approval gate and /analytics validate.

task_signature.context: Define screen-prefixed analytics events for a feature, following the naming convention in CLAUDE.md.

learned_patterns.decision: Every screen-scoped event uses {screen}_ prefix. Established prefixes: home_, training_, nutrition_, stats_, settings_, onboarding_, auth_. Cross-screen lifecycle events stay unprefixed (app_open, session_start, sign_in, sign_up). GA4 recommended events keep their dictated names (tutorial_begin, tutorial_complete, login, share).

Typical screen event set: {screen}_action_tap, {screen}_metric_viewed, {screen}_empty_state_shown, {screen}_error_shown. Extend with screen-specific actions (e.g. training_workout_start, nutrition_scanner_opened).
Write 1-3 tests per event: (1) event fires on action, (2) event params are correct, (3) optional no-fire test in wrong state. Target density of 1.3-2.7 tests per event.

anti_patterns.what_went_wrong: Pre-Training events (Onboarding, Home) were inconsistent — some had screen prefix, some did not. Always apply screen-prefix mechanically from day one.
anti_patterns.source_execution: Onboarding v2 and Home v2 analytics retrospective

anti_patterns.what_went_wrong: Home v2 had 5.25 tests/event, which was a one-time learning cost and not a target. Right-sized density is 1.3-2.7 tests/event. Anything above 3.0 is over-tested.

speedup_instructions: Apply screen-prefix mechanically. For each action, generate {screen}_{action}. Cross-ref analytics-taxonomy.csv. Generate 2 tests per event.
